Jacob D. Colvin, esq. (415-474-1900) of Kern Segal & Murray for Defendant Dean Criddle.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DEAN CRIDDLE's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination, Deposition, And Request For Sanctions.

Granted, request for sanctions is Denied. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to sbs@sbslawsf.com
